courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Voice and Agency Game
genericDescription: Design speaking, silence, command, or refusal as mechanics; examine who can act and who is acted upon; create player accountability.
specificDescription: Build a game where voice, prompt, response, consent, testimony, authorship, or model output changes what can happen. Include at least one meaningful refusal path.
gradingRubric: 30 pts agency design; 20 pts voice mechanic; 20 pts track alignment; 15 pts respectful framing; 15 pts notes.
